description: An auditor reviews sales commission payments to ensure they were calculated correctly.

nodes.task_description: Obtain the commission payment data for the last quarter.

expected_outcome.expected: The auditor has the payment data.

nodes.task_description: Select a sample of 20 commission payments.

expected_outcome.expected: A sample is selected for testing.

nodes.task_description: For each payment, obtain the underlying sales data and manually recalculate the commission based on the official commission plan.

expected_outcome.expected: The auditor finds two payments that were miscalculated due to using the wrong commission rate, resulting in overpayments.
